S.FORM: Aziya ru Asyuw hya' ga syuw na hiyal. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 44,579,000 sq km (maki' tay 1ginkgan kin wahci') Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 126,702,133. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Asia CIA world factbook Asia Encyclop√¶dia Britannica
S.PHON: azija ru as~…ējuw ńßja Ē …£a s~…ējuw na ńßijal. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē **,***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj *…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a ***,***,***. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē as~…ēia ¶~ ®ia worl* *a ¶~ ®tő≤ook as~…ēia en ¶~ ®j ¶~ ®lop**ia ő≤ritanni ¶~ ®a
